user.title: TeamSpeak Server
user.description: How should the integration talk to your TeamSpeak server?

menu_options.webquery: WebQuery HTTP API with API key (recommended)

webquery.title: TeamSpeak WebQuery
webquery.description: WebQuery must be enabled on the server (query_protocols=raw,http). Create an API key with the ServerQuery command: apikeyadd scope=manage lifetime=0 (scope=read is enough for monitoring, but management actions need write/manage).

serverquery.title: TeamSpeak ServerQuery
serverquery.description: Connect to the raw ServerQuery interface of your TeamSpeak server.

error.invalid_sid: This virtual server ID does not exist on the server

poke_client.name: Poke client
poke_client.description: Sends a poke (pop-up alert) to a connected client.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

client_id.name: Client ID
client_id.description: The clid of the client (see the 'clients' attribute of the Clients connected sensor).

move_client.name: Move client
move_client.description: Moves a client into another channel.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

channel_id.name: Channel ID
channel_id.description: The cid of the target channel (see the 'channels' attribute of the Channels sensor).

kick_client.name: Kick client
kick_client.description: Kicks a client from its channel or from the server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

scope.name: Scope
scope.description: Kick from the current channel or from the whole server.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason shown to the client.

ban_client.name: Ban client
ban_client.description: Bans a client from the server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: Ban duration in seconds; 0 means permanent.

send_message.name: Send message to client
send_message.description: Sends a private text message to a connected client.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

broadcast_message.name: Broadcast message
broadcast_message.description: Sends a text message to everyone on the virtual server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

unban_client.name: Remove ban
unban_client.description: Deletes an active ban (see the 'bans' attribute of the Active bans sensor).

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

send_channel_message.name: Send channel message
send_channel_message.description: Posts a text message into a channel (the query client is moved there briefly).

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

channel_id.name: Channel ID
channel_id.description: The cid of the target channel.

get_logs.name: Get server logs
get_logs.description: Returns the most recent server log lines as response data.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

instance.name: Instance log
instance.description: Read the instance log instead of the virtual server log.

get_client_info.name: Get client details
get_client_info.description: Returns connection details of a client (connected time, ping, bytes, IP...).

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

get_channel_info.name: Get channel details
get_channel_info.description: Returns full details of a channel including its description.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

create_channel.name: Create channel
create_channel.description: Creates a new channel; returns the new channel id as response data.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

parent_id.name: Parent channel
parent_id.description: cid of the parent channel (omit for top level).

channel_type.name: Type
channel_type.description: Permanent, semi-permanent (until server restart) or temporary.

edit_channel.name: Edit channel
edit_channel.description: Changes properties of an existing channel; only provided fields are changed.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

edit_server.name: Edit server
edit_server.description: Changes global settings of the virtual server; only provided fields are changed.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

name.name: Server name
name.description: New name of the virtual server.

welcome_message.name: Welcome message
welcome_message.description: New welcome message shown to connecting clients.

max_clients.name: Maximum clients
max_clients.description: New client limit of the virtual server.

config_entry_id.name: Server
config_entry_id.description: The TeamSpeak server to act on (only needed if you have more than one).

force.name: Force
force.description: Also delete if clients are inside (they get kicked).

data_description.scan_interval: How often the server is queried (10-300 seconds).
